name: assigned_to
label: Assigned To
description: Links a task to the person responsible for completing it.

name: belongs_to_project
label: Belongs To Project
description: Links a task to its parent project.

name: involves_person
label: Involves Person
description: Links a calendar event to a person who attends or is involved.

name: located_at
label: Located At
description: Associates an entity with a physical place (calendar events, items, etc.).

name: related_to_contact
label: Has Contact Record
description: Links a Person (enriched graph entity) to its raw Contact record.

name: triggered_task
label: Triggered Task
description: Links a calendar event or note to a task it spawned as a follow-up.

name: works_at
label: Works At
description: Links a person to the company they work for or contract with.

name: uses_service
label: Uses Service
description: Links a person to an online service or platform they use.

name: has_subscription
label: Has Plan
description: Links a service to its recurring payment plan.

name: has_transaction
label: Has Transaction
description: Links a subscription, invoice, or project to an associated financial transaction.

name: owns_device
label: Owns Device
description: Links a person to a tech device they own or use.

name: owns_item
label: Owns Item
description: Links a person to a physical item they own.

name: drives
label: Drives
description: Links a person to a vehicle they own or drive.

name: tracks_habit
label: Tracks Habit
description: Links a person to a habit they are tracking.

name: member_of
label: Member Of
description: Links a person to a project they participate in.

name: covered_by
label: Covered By
description: Links a car to its insurance policy.

name: shopping_for
label: Shopping For
description: Links a shopping item to the trip it is intended for.

name: has_task
label: Has Task
description: Links a trip or project to a task that is part of its execution.
